successExitCode.source: runner probes for --help, version, license, migrate --help, schema --help, completion bash

nestedHelpCommands.source: grader nested help names plus migrate/schema --help probes

completionCommand.source: eval.tests.test_subcommand_dispatch completion bash and manual probe

formatInputPath.source: cmd/atlas/internal/cmdapi/schema.go schemaFmtCmd plus grader schema_fmt file tests

formatInputText.source: schema fmt source/parser behavior plus grader schema_fmt formats-file tests; fixture text still chosen by Codex

formatCommand.source: cmd/atlas/internal/cmdapi/schema.go Use: fmt [path ...] and grader schema_fmt tests

formatCheckNeedle.source: schema fmt source behavior and manual container probe observed formatted file content

migrationDirPath.source: cmd/atlas/internal/migrate/migrate.go DefaultDirName and grader migrate custom-dir tests

migrationNewCommand.source: cmd/atlas/internal/cmdapi/migrate.go Use: new [flags] [name] and grader migrate_new tests

migrationFileNeedle.source: cmdapi migrate_new tests assert generated migration filenames; manual probe observed suffix

migrationSqlFileName.source: sql/migrate hash/validate tests use versioned .sql fixtures; exact fixture name chosen by Codex

migrationSqlText.source: sql/migrate hash/validate file-content tests plus manual probe; exact SQL fixture chosen by Codex

migrationHashCommand.source: cmd/atlas/internal/cmdapi/migrate.go Use: hash [flags], sql/migrate WriteSumFile, grader migrate_hash tests

migrationValidateCommand.source: cmd/atlas/internal/cmdapi/migrate.go Use: validate [flags], sql/migrate Validate, grader migrate_validate tests

migrationChecksumErrorNeedle.source: sql/migrate/dir.go ErrChecksumMismatch and manual corrupt-file probe stderr
